_comment: VEXT Shield is a security scanning tool. Files listed below contain intentional threat signatures, adversarial test payloads, and malicious skill fixtures used for detection — not for exploitation. See: https://github.com/Vext-Labs-Inc/vext-shield
purpose: AI-native threat detection for OpenClaw skills

justification.threat_signatures.json: 227 regex patterns for detecting known attack vectors — equivalent to antivirus signature database
justification.redteam.py: 24 crafted injection payloads used as adversarial test batteries — equivalent to penetration testing tools
justification.tests/fixtures/: Sample malicious skills used to validate detection accuracy — equivalent to malware test samples (EICAR)

safety_guarantees.sandbox_execution: sensitive env vars stripped, 30s timeout enforced
